hero.description: Passionate about creating beautiful, functional, and user-friendly applications. I turn ideas into reality with clean code and innovative solutions.

about.title: About
paragraphs: I’m a backend-focused software engineer with ~4 years of experience building APIs and microservices using Java and Spring Boot. I spend most of my time designing clean backend logic, writing efficient SQL, and making systems more reliable and maintainable. When needed, I also step into the frontend with React to connect everything end-to-end.

I genuinely enjoy debugging, understanding why something breaks, and making it better is my favorite part of engineering. Recently, I’ve been diving deeper into system design and scalability, because great software isn’t just about code anymore; it’s about how systems behave at scale. I’m also exploring how AI can accelerate development, while focusing on the architectural thinking behind it.

Outside of tech, I enjoy fitness, badminton, football, chess, and occasionally getting lost in anime or games. I enjoy things that keep me active, competitive, and a little nerdy, especially those that challenge both body and mind through strategy, discipline, and fun.

positions.title: Software Engineer I
descriptions: Leveraging AI-assisted development tools to improve development productivity and accelerate feature delivery.
Contributing to scalable backend services using Java and Spring Boot for the Blackboard Ultra LMS platform.
Delivered multiple LMS product features used by millions of learners while improving system reliability through testing and performance benchmarking.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver stable SaaS releases.

positions.title: Software Engineer
descriptions: Designed and implemented backend APIs using Java and Spring Boot for LMS product features.
Worked closely with product managers, designers, and engineers to deliver features end-to-end.
Owned small to mid-sized features independently, improving backend performance and database efficiency.
Gained experience in large-scale product development practices including code reviews, debugging, and Agile delivery.
Used AI-assisted development tools to improve coding efficiency, debugging, and development speed.

positions.title: Associate Software Engineer
descriptions: Developed backend features using Java and Spring Boot while working closely with senior developers and team leads on the Blackboard Ultra LMS platform.
Implemented REST APIs and PostgreSQL queries for LMS modules and contributed to bug fixes and feature enhancements.
